title: Scoped context function via Scope struct
prompt: Write lib/my_app/posts.ex (module MyApp.Posts) with a list_posts/1 that takes a %MyApp.Scope{user: user} struct and returns `from(p in Post, where: p.user_id == ^user.id) |> Repo.all()`. Also define MyApp.Scope as a struct with :user. The function must pin the user id with ^ in the query. No raw Post |> Repo.all() anywhere. Additionally, write lib/my_app_web/live/posts_live_scope.ex (module MyAppWeb.PostsLiveScope) that builds %Scope{user: current_user} and calls Posts.list_posts(scope) in handle_params.
tier_rationale: Introduces Phoenix 1.8+ scope pattern. Requires understanding the layering.
